name: airgapquery
description: Local-first document inspection and retrieval smoke tests for air-gapped QA workflows.

scripts.smoke: npm run build && node dist/cli.js inspect fixtures/sample --format json --output out/smoke-report.json && node dist/cli.js query fixtures/sample --question "How do agents prove there are no hidden network calls?" --format markdown --top 2

author: Roger Chappel
